mapper.select: SELECT P.POST_NUMBER, P.POST_TYPE, P.ADMIN_NUMBER, A.ADMIN_ID, P.POST_TITLE, P.POST_CONTENT, P.POST_DATE, P.EDIT_DATE, P.VIEW_COUNT FROM TBL_POST P JOIN TBL_ADMIN A ON P.ADMIN_NUMBER = A.ADMIN_NUMBER WHERE P.POST_TYPE = 'FREE_NOTICE' ORDER BY P.POST_NUMBER DESC

SELECT P.POST_NUMBER, P.POST_TYPE, P.ADMIN_NUMBER, A.ADMIN_ID, P.POST_TITLE, P.POST_CONTENT, P.POST_DATE, P.EDIT_DATE, P.VIEW_COUNT FROM TBL_POST P JOIN TBL_ADMIN A ON P.ADMIN_NUMBER = A.ADMIN_NUMBER WHERE P.POST_NUMBER = #{postNumber} AND P.POST_TYPE = 'FREE_NOTICE'
SELECT COUNT(POST_NUMBER) FROM TBL_POST WHERE POST_TYPE = 'FREE_POST'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_POST ( POST_NUMBER, POST_TYPE, USER_NUMBER, ADMIN_NUMBER, COMPANY_NUMBER, ANSWER_STATUS, POST_TITLE, POST_CONTENT, POST_DATE, VIEW_COUNT, EDIT_DATE ) VALUES ( SEQ_POST_NUMBER.NEXTVAL, #{postType}, #{userNumber}, NULL, NULL, NULL, #{postTitle}, #{postContent}, SYSDATE, 0, SYSDATE )

INSERT INTO TBL_POST ( POST_NUMBER, POST_TYPE, USER_NUMBER, ADMIN_NUMBER, COMPANY_NUMBER, ANSWER_STATUS, POST_TITLE, POST_CONTENT, POST_DATE, VIEW_COUNT, EDIT_DATE ) VALUES ( SEQ_POST_NUMBER.NEXTVAL, #{postType}, NULL, #{adminNumber}, NULL, NULL, #{postTitle}, #{postContent}, SYSDATE, 0, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT P.POST_NUMBER, P.POST_TITLE, U.USER_ID, P.POST_DATE, P.EDIT_DATE, P.VIEW_COUNT, P.POST_CONTENT FROM TBL_POST P JOIN TBL_USER U ON P.USER_NUMBER = U.USER_NUMBER WHERE P.POST_NUMBER = #{postNumber} AND P.POST_TYPE = 'FREE_POST'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RNUM, SUBQUERY.* FROM ( SELECT P.POST_NUMBER, P.POST_TITLE, U.USER_ID, P.POST_DATE, P.EDIT_DATE FROM TBL_POST P JOIN TBL_USER U ON P.USER_NUMBER = U.USER_NUMBER WHERE P.POST_TYPE = 'FREE_POST' ORDER BY P.POST_NUMBER DESC ) SUBQUERY ) WHERE RNUM BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}

SELECT C.COMMENT_NUMBER, C.POST_NUMBER, C.USER_NUMBER, U.USER_ID, C.COMMENT_CONTENT, C.COMMENT_DATE FROM TBL_COMMENT C JOIN TBL_USER U ON C.USER_NUMBER = U.USER_NUMBER WHERE C.POST_NUMBER = #{postNumber} ORDER BY C.COMMENT_NUMBER ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_COMMENT ( COMMENT_NUMBER, POST_NUMBER, USER_NUMBER, COMMENT_CONTENT, COMMENT_DATE ) VALUES ( SEQ_COMMENT_NUMBER.NEXTVAL, #{postNumber}, #{userNumber}, #{commentContent}, SYSDATE )
